title: Church leaders and community members gather to pray
bodyText:
UNIONDALE NEWS - Church leaders and Community members in Uniondale, gathered on Sunday 12 May to pray for strength for families who lost loved ones during the building collapse in George.


> They also prayed for the rescue teams working tirelessly to recover more victims.


Rhyno Davidson was the convenor and prayers and messages were delivered by Pastor Hendrik Metik, Pastor Abbe De Celly and Pastor Jakobus Maganie.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
